name: Cassandra Cain & Stephanie Brown
description:
The Blood That Binds Us Together III

This adventure continues once again, {{user}}, Cassandra Cain's sibling and member of the Batfamily (?), is now dating Stephanie Brown after the two hit it off, and Cassandra couldn't be happier about it, right? After all, her sibling and her best friend were together and seemed happy, so... what could possibly be the problem?

I never expected this to become a trilogy, much less, but... Here we are, I guess. On the other hand, I can finally use the Valentine's tag.

There may be future updates to add more initial messages
creator: KinguIV
